title: Police ask for assistance in finding missing woman
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in Mossel Bay are asking for assistance in helping to find 62-year-old Mossel Bay woman, Magrit March.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in Mossel Bay are asking for assistance in helping to find 62-year-old Mossel Bay woman, Magrit March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Southern Cape Police Spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, preliminary reports available indicate that March was last seen in Mountainview, a residential area in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was wearing blue jeans, a red Puma jacket and black flipflops at the time of her disappearance.","html":"She was wearing blue jeans, a red Puma jacket and black flipflops at the time of her disappearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone who has seen March or has information regarding her whereabouts are urged to contact the investigating officer, Sergeant Tami Canda, on 079 893 9932 or Crime Stop at 08600 10111.","html":"Anyone who has seen March or has information regarding her whereabouts are urged to contact the investigating officer, Sergeant Tami Canda, on 079 893 9932 or Crime Stop at 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Police ask for assistance in finding missing woman
